source_pr.title: stats: improve code coverage
source_pr.body:
<!--
Thank you for contributing to TiDB! Please read TiDB's [CONTRIBUTING](https://github.com/pingcap/tidb/blob/master/CONTRIBUTING.md) document **BEFORE** filing this PR.
-->

### What problem does this PR solve? <!--add issue link with summary if exists-->

Improve code coverage of stats.

### What is changed and how it works?

- Add more tests, from 82% to 84.8%.

### Check List <!--REMOVE the items that are not applicable-->

Tests <!-- At least one of them must be included. -->

 - Unit test

Code changes

 - Has exported function/method change

Side effects

 - Possible performance regression

Related changes

 - Need to cherry-pick to the release branch

symptoms: sql: "select * from t where t.a <= 5 order by a desc", (statistics/handle/update_test.go)
failure_signature: sql: "select * from t where t.a <= 5 order by a desc", (statistics/handle/update_test.go)
root_cause_explanation: INSUFFICIENT_EVIDENCE: This PR primarily improves statistics code coverage by adding/updating tests. The case evidence is a test SQL snippet rather than an intermittent failure signature, so keep the conservative fallback classification rather than guessing nondeterminism categories.
fix_pattern: N/A (insufficient evidence; no targeted stabilization change identified).

evidence: evidence: sql: "select * from t where t.a <= 5 order by a desc", (statistics/handle/update_test.go)
